chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-49 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A. 7309/2022 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 7310/2022 4. For hearing of main case 23.08.2022 Mr. Afzal Karim Virk advocate for applicants along with applicants. ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. It is stated that the applicants are innocent but has been falsely implicated in this case out of enmity; that the applicants want to surrender before the trial court but need protection as they apprehend their arrest on account of issuance of NBWs against him. It is further stated that earlier applicants were granted protective bail in Criminal Bail Application No.D-45 of 2022 vide order dated 26.07.2022 but due to rainy weather they could not approach the concerned court. Hence this application. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicantsare granted protective bail for eight days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (ten thousand) each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. NBWs issued against the applicants shall remain suspended during the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of eight days on 30.08.2022 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE
